_meta.resume_note: Pinned to the official 2025-2026 Victor Valley College whole-catalog PDF. The catalog lists one in-scope Biology AS-T and no general local Biology associate degree; requirements are extracted from catalog page 143.

degrees.tmc_version_basis: The 2025-2026 catalog requires one of two physics sequences, matching the prior Biology TMC rather than Biology 2.0.
degrees.catalog_status_seen: State control number 41089 and program code BIOL.CALGETC.AS-T are listed in the official 2025-2026 catalog; no inactive or teach-out language is displayed.

sources.locator: PDF catalog page 143, Biology, AS-T: Degree Requirements, Required Core, List A, List B, and Total Units table

major_groups.choice_structure_seen: Complete CHEM 201 and CHEM 202; choose MATH 226 or MATH 226H; and complete either PHYS 221 and PHYS 222 or PHYS 202 and PHYS 203.

courses.title_seen: Honors Analytic Geometry and Calculus I
Engineering Physics II - Fluids, Sound, and Thermodynamics
Engineering Physics III Electricity and Magnetism

major_groups.choice_structure_seen: Select zero to one course of additional major preparation if required articulation exists.

major_groups.label_seen: CSU-transferable electives as needed to reach 60 units

degrees.notes: The 2025-2026 degree table prints List A as a 22-unit block but does not print individual course units; those course-level units remain null rather than being inferred. The page contains an older sentence naming IGETC, followed by the operative graduation list requiring Cal-GETC. The exact program code also contains CALGETC. No material major-requirement or printed-total difference was found versus the 2026-2027 record.

notes: The official 2025-2026 whole-catalog PDF lists Biology AS-T as the only general Biology associate degree. Certificates and adjacent science programs were ignored, and out_of_scope_candidates remains empty by batch instruction.
